title: Cheesecraft
body:
This project adds simple cheesemaking to Minecraft that attempts to reflect traditional cheesemaking practices without adding complex mechanics or machines.

This mod adds:
- The Cask, a machine used to age cheese wheels
- Cheese Curds, a light snack for impatient cheesemakers
- Cheese Wedges, a fulfilling food made from cheese wheels
- Rennet & Salt for turning milk into curds

Use this mod if:
- You're interested in learning about cheesemaking through Minecraft
- You want a simple vanilla+ food mod

Don't use this mod if:
- You want more technical/complex cheesemaking
- You want heavy integration with other food/tech mods

To Make Cheese:
- Start by gathering milk from a cow, salt from crafting a water bucket, and rennet from cow stomachs (obtained by killing cows)
- Combine those three ingredients to make cheese curds
- If you're willing to wait, craft those curds into a fresh cheese wheel
- This fresh cheese wheel then can be put into a cask to age
- Going from fresh to regular cheese takes one in-game day of aging, and going from regular to aged takes seven in-game days. Cheesemaking requires patience!
